text_block_list.text:
Seeing Tamamo Cross ahead, City looks back at
me, uncertain. I decide to give her a nudge.
choice_data_list: Go tell her how you feel.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Seems like you're back to normal. You ran good
in the Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
But I can't tell if ya overcame some kinda hurdle,
or you're like this 'cause ya just stopped carin'.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Did ya figure out the reason why ya run?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Except that... I want to. I run because I want to. I
want to keep running and running...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
And I want to win. I don't want to lose to anyone.
Especially you!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Yup. All that's left to do is run past it all!
